heading: Legal representatives
label: 3920 Legal representatives
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to section 519 of the former Appendix to this title prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.
Effective DateSection applicable to any case not final before , see , set out as a note under .Dec. 19, 2003section 3 of Pub. L. 108–189section 3901 of this title

children.text: An attorney acting on the behalf of a servicemember.
An individual possessing a power of attorney.

children.heading: Application
children.label: b Application
children.text: Whenever the term “servicemember” is used in this chapter, such term shall be treated as including a reference to a legal representative of the servicemember.
